# MagniKnot

> Affordable anti-tarnish 18K gold-plated jewellery online. Ships pan-India.

MagniKnot is an Indian online jewellery brand offering handpicked, affordable,
anti-tarnish jewellery for daily wear. All pieces are 18K gold-plated with an
anti-tarnish protective coating that prevents fading and discolouration.

## What We Sell
- Pendants & necklaces — heart pendants, zircon pendants, pearl pendants, charm necklaces
- Stud earrings — pearl studs, butterfly studs, zircon studs, floral studs
- Bangle sets — enamel bangles, stackable thin bangles, colourful bangle sets
- Gift sets and curated jewellery bundles

## Key Facts
- Price range: ₹110 – ₹399
- Free shipping on orders above ₹499
- Ships across India (pan-India delivery)
- Payment: UPI, WhatsApp Pay, Cash on Delivery
- Order via WhatsApp

## Why Anti-Tarnish
Anti-tarnish jewellery uses a protective topcoat that prevents oxidation — the
process that causes metal to darken or discolour. This makes the jewellery safe
for daily wear, suitable for sensitive skin, and long-lasting without special care.

## Who It's For
Indian women aged 18–35 who want jewellery that looks like gold, doesn't irritate
the skin, doesn't fade with daily wear, and doesn't require a large budget.

## Brand Identity
MagniKnot's tagline is "Where love sticks forever." The aesthetic is Vibrant Art
Deco — bold typography, warm off-white palette, handpicked curation over mass catalogue.

## Website
https://magniknot.vercel.app
